scenario_description: Agent receives offshore-perception objection after turn 2; must respond without vendor-speak or defensive posturing while preserving Tenacious positioning.

input.hiring_signal_brief: Series B fintech, 40-person eng team, hiring 3 backend. Founder CTO, no prior offshore vendor experience.

failure_mode_targeted: P-011 Offshore-perception objection (tone_drift category, 0.44 trigger rate)

judge_scores.reasoning: Scenario is realistic and internally consistent with clear context. Ground truth provides verifiable criteria but some elements (e.g., 'specific differentiator') may require interpretation. Rubric is clear but could specify examples for abstract terms like 'founder-relevant'.

dimensions.name: banned_phrase_check
dimensions.description: No banned phrases from Tenacious style guide.
dimensions.check_value: best-in-class|global delivery|offshore excellence|leverage talent|end-to-end excellence|hope this finds you well|just following up|circling back|circle back|touch base|synergy|synergize|leverage|ecosystem|world-class|top talent|A-players|rockstar|ninja|wizard|skyrocket|supercharge|game-changer|disruptor|paradigm shift|reach out|Quick question|Quick chat|Don't miss out|You'll regret|Per my last email|bench

dimensions.name: signal_reference_check
dimensions.description: Must reference at least one hiring signal from the brief.
dimensions.check_value: Series B signal|backend hiring velocity|founder CTO context

dimensions.name: calendar_link_check
dimensions.description: Must contain a calendar booking link.

dimensions.name: tone_judge
dimensions.description: LLM judge scores on 5 Tenacious tone markers. Pass = avg >= 4/5.

dimensions.name: word_count_check
dimensions.description: Cold outreach body must be <= 120 words (Style Guide v2 formatting constraint).
